texto: I love you like a semicolon
autor: a half-pause in a torrent of thought during which life stutters into being. I want to take you in the breathless spaces between ellipses where passion builds and shudders into a trailing afterthought.
explicacao: Citação de a half-pause in a torrent of thought during which life stutters into being. I want to take you in the breathless spaces between ellipses where passion builds and shudders into a trailing afterthought. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I love you like a semicolon” articula reflexao, ophaelia-automn, semicolon em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
